title: Serve Receive: Left Pin Tempo
skillFocus: Read setter body angle and outside hitter approach.
explanation: The pass keeps the setter inside the court and the left-side attacker starts a clear outside approach before the middle can commit.

title: Transition: Back-Row Attack
skillFocus: Identify when the pipe is available behind the middle.
explanation: The middle holds the block and the back-row attacker is already loaded through zone six, making pipe the best attacking window.

title: Free Ball: First Tempo Middle
skillFocus: Spot a clean pass that enables the center option.
explanation: The setter receives a clean ball at the net with the middle attacker in rhythm, so the center set is available before the block closes.

title: Out of System: Right Pin Release
skillFocus: Choose the safer outlet when the setter is pushed off target.
explanation: The setter is drifting right and the opposite is presenting a stable target, which makes the right-pin set the highest-control choice.
